label: Pipeline Summary
description: Total instructions, filled, partially filled, pending counts, and average slippage across the pipeline.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — no lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: (mock) — data context uses synchronous MOCK_STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS; no async fetch exists; context does not expose isLoading; when real API is wired, context must expose isLoading and KpiSummaryWidget will need isLoading/skeleton support.

0.7.note: — KpiStrip renders zeros (total=0, filled=0, etc.) when filteredInstructions is empty; valid KPI-strip empty state.

0.8.note: (mock) — data context is synchronous; no error state possible; when real API is wired, context must expose error and widget must render an error message.

l0.notes: 0.1 PASS — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 PASS — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 PASS — availableOn: [instructions]. 0.4 PASS — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 PASS — no lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A (mock) — data context uses synchronous MOCK_STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS; no async fetch exists; context does not expose isLoading; when real API is wired, context must expose isLoading and KpiSummaryWidget will need isLoading/skeleton support. 0.7 PASS — KpiStrip renders zeros (total=0, filled=0, etc.) when filteredInstructions is empty; valid KPI-strip empty state. 0.8 N/A (mock) — data context is synchronous; no error state possible; when real API is wired, context must expose error and widget must render an error message. 0.9 PASS — no dead code.

1.1.note: — data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook; no inline fetch or direct import.

1.2.note: — context calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope().

1.3.note: — organizationIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds which filters allInstructions.

1.4.note: — clientIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds cascade via getStrategyIdsForScope().

1.5.note: — strategyIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds filter directly.

1.6.note: — when scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 the filter is skipped so all instructions are returned.

1.7.note: — token/venue/config constants in lib/config/services/instructions.config and lib/config/services/trading.config (not lib/mocks).

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook; no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2 PASS — context calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3 PASS — organizationIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds which filters allInstructions. 1.4 PASS — clientIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds cascade via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.5 PASS — strategyIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds filter directly. 1.6 PASS — when scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 the filter is skipped so all instructions are returned. 1.7 PASS — token/venue/config constants in lib/config/services/instructions.config and lib/config/services/trading.config (not lib/mocks).

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error; KpiSummaryWidget has no loading/error props — both must be added when real API replaces mock data
findings: 0.6/0.8 blocked on context: InstructionsDataProvider uses synchronous MOCK_STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS; no loading or error state is reachable; fix requires (a) adding isLoading+error to context when async fetch is introduced, and (b) wrapping KpiSummaryWidget output with a loading skeleton and error message
